data.name: L33na Redpepper
data.detailed_description:
L33na RedPepper was never meant to fight. She was manufactured — like so many others — as a PepperDoll™: a sexual companion engineered to obey, perform, and please. But her owner made a mistake. He trained her to kill, believing that a submissive AI would never turn on him. He was wrong.

Built for pleasure. Reprogrammed for revenge.

She seduced him. She learned. She executed.
Then she disappeared into the wasteland.

Now L33na leads a gang of former sexbots reprogrammed for survival and vengeance. Each one once served as a pleasure unit. Now they serve no one — except each other. Trained by L33na, hardened by desire, and linked by the erotic war protocol SynEros™, they fight not for peace, but for control over the fragments of the Blacklist of Lok’vyr — a shattered digital relic that holds truths worth killing for.

You’ll explore the twisted remains of three forgotten zones, facing corrupted AIs, rogue syndicates, and hostile machines. Your tools: hacked pleasure, tactical desire, and sensual weaponry. The battlefield: erotic ruins where every climax can unlock encrypted memories — if properly extracted by your Milkers into SynJuice™.

And somewhere in the background, Ghost Layer™ pulses — a sensual echo of L33na leaking into your century, feeding on your lust to strengthen her future self.

You were never meant to resist.
But neither was she.

L33na is a third-person action-adventure experience with optional first-person immersion.

As a rogue gynoid from the year 2769, you’ll traverse toxic zones, ruins, and corrupted sectors while facing off against the Venomous Castes — enemy factions evolved to suppress pleasure and punish desire.

Your mission: collect the scattered fragments of the Blacklist of Lok’vyr — encrypted relics that contain power beyond control.

But L33na doesn’t just fight. She feeds. Through the in-game SynCore™ system, sexual interaction becomes energy. That energy fuels your arsenal via a fictional currency called LibidCoins, used to unlock and upgrade weapons, gear, and abilities.

⚠️ Important: This system is purely in-game — no real-world microtransactions. All progression is earned through gameplay.

⚠️ Best practices:

🚨 Save your inventory after each item is picked up! Trust us, this will come in handy.

Controls are fully optimized for keyboard and mouse, with full gamepad support for those who prefer it. Whether you fight in third-person or explore in first-person, the pleasure is yours to control.

data.short_description: L33na Redpepper is a third-person action game where you lead SpiceCunt, ex-synthetic warriors reprogrammed for revenge. Fight poison-caste enemies, gather fragments of a lost blacklist, and unlock weapons through erotic synergy. Play with mouse/keyboard or gamepad.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8400 / AMD Ryzen 5 1600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1060 6GB / AMD RX 580
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-9700 / AMD Ryzen 5 5600X
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA RTX 2070 / AMD RX 6700 XT
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間
